code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
end

fn byte_or(_ s: String, _ i: Int, _ default: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    default
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    mut best = ""
    mut best_len = 0
    mut cur = ""
    mut cur_len = 0
    mut i = 0
    let n = string.len(line)
    while i < n
      let b = byte_or(line, i, 32)
      if is_ws(b)
        if cur_len > best_len
          best = cur
          best_len = cur_len
        end
        cur = ""
        cur_len = 0
      else
        cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        cur_len = cur_len + 1
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if cur_len > best_len
      best = cur
      best_len = cur_len
    end
    println("longest=#{best}")
  when None
    println("longest=")
  end
end
